# README assets

Drop **`dashboard.gif`** here. It is referenced as the hero image at the top of the
project `README.md` / `README.ko.md`.

Ideal capture: a short loop showing a message routing to a part on the board, with the
token/thread counters updating live - i.e. the dashboard actually doing its job. A static
`dashboard.png` works too (update the README `<img src>` if you change the filename).

Suggested width: ~860px. Keep the file reasonably small so the README loads fast.
